river_map_hetu.description: The Hetu (Yellow River Map) represents the Early Heaven mathematical order of the universe and the generation of the five elements.

luo_shu.description: The Luo Shu square represents the Later Heaven movement of Qi through the nine palaces.

early_heaven_fuxi.description: Perfect balance and primordial state. Used for internal and spiritual readings.

later_heaven_king_wen.description: The cycle of life and temporal manifestation. Used for daily life and business readings.

xuan_kong_da_gua.description: The connection between the 64 hexagrams and the 24 Mountains/Flying Stars.
xuan_kong_da_gua.period_9_incoming: Fire Period (2024-2043) - Emphasizes technology, spirituality, and clarity.

principles: Qi rides the wind and scatters, but is retained when encountering water.
Dragon veins (mountains) provide stability and power.
Water mouths (rivers/roads) manage the flow of wealth and opportunity.
